name: TinyClaw
description: Multi-agent, multi-team, multi-channel 24/7 AI assistant. Run Discord & Telegram bots powered by Claude or OpenAI, with a Next.js web dashboard (TinyOffice).

services.name: tinyclaw
services.description: TinyClaw backend — queue processor, API server (port 3777), Discord & Telegram channel clients.

variables.name: AI_PROVIDER
variables.description: AI provider to use: 'anthropic' (Claude Code CLI) or 'openai' (Codex CLI).

variables.name: AI_MODEL
variables.description: Model name. Anthropic: 'sonnet' or 'opus'. OpenAI: 'gpt-5.3-codex' or 'gpt-5.2'.

variables.name: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
variables.description: Anthropic API key — required if AI_PROVIDER=anthropic.

variables.name: OPENAI_API_KEY
variables.description: OpenAI API key — required if AI_PROVIDER=openai.

variables.name: TINYCLAW_CHANNELS
variables.description: Comma-separated list of channels to enable. Supported on Railway: 'discord', 'telegram'. Example: 'discord,telegram'.

variables.name: DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN
variables.description: Discord bot token — required if 'discord' is in TINYCLAW_CHANNELS.

variables.name: TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN
variables.description: Telegram bot token — required if 'telegram' is in TINYCLAW_CHANNELS.

variables.name: TINYCLAW_API_PORT
variables.description: Port for the TinyClaw REST API server.

variables.name: TINYCLAW_HOME
variables.description: Directory for TinyClaw data (SQLite DB, logs, queue). Should match the Volume mount path.

variables.name: AGENT_NAME
variables.description: Display name of the default AI assistant agent.

variables.name: HEARTBEAT_INTERVAL
variables.description: How often agents proactively check in, in seconds.

services.name: tinyoffice
services.description: TinyOffice — Next.js web dashboard for TinyClaw. Chat console, agent/team management, Kanban tasks, logs, and settings.

variables.name: NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL
variables.description: Public URL of the tinyclaw backend service (e.g. https://tinyclaw-production.up.railway.app).

variables.name: PORT
variables.description: Port for Next.js server. Railway injects this automatically.
